title: WEFT Progress — Stash2Go Profile
description: Stash2Go profile of Progress. Extends the base Progress schema with Ravelry project binding, managed PDF state versioning, and counter ownership tracking.

ravelry.description: Ravelry project ID this progress belongs to

stash2go.description: Stash2Go-specific fields that extend the generic WEFT Progress.

ravelry_project_id.description: Ravelry numeric project ID (used for counter API calls).

managed_state_version.description: Schema version of the managed PDF state blob (e.g., '2.0').

owner_guid.description: GUID linking counters/pieces to their originating chart or marker.

owner_chart_id.description: ID of the chart region that owns managed counters.

owner_marker_id.description: ID of the PDF marker that owns managed counters.

owner_pdf_url.description: URL of the PDF this progress state is linked to.

managed_by_pattern_logic.description: Whether counters are system-managed by smart pattern analysis.

device_id.description: Device that last modified this progress state.

watch_sync_enabled.description: Whether this progress syncs to Apple Watch / Wear OS.
